# llm-native-lang v0.1.0 (skeleton)

## Summary

Initial public release skeleton for deterministic language/runtime contracts.

## Highlights

- Core language contracts and precedence tiers.
- Deterministic interpreter/runtime behavior and replay coverage.
- Validator-backed `.lnd` / `.lnc` format enforcement.

## Validation baseline

- `python3 scripts/lnd_validate.py evolution`
- `python3 scripts/lnd_validate.py contracts`
- `python3 scripts/lnd_validate.py formats`
- `python3 scripts/lnc_validate.py runtime`

## Compatibility notes

- Contract-first project surface; breaking changes should be called out in future notes.
